implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: UI form for adding a new task, collects title, description, priority, due date, and passes data to the parent via onSubmit. Currently does not include a user name field.
implementation.name: TaskForm
implementation.pseudo_code:
Render a form with fields:
  - Title (required)
  - Description
  - Priority (Low/Medium/High)
  - Due Date
On submit:
  - Validate required fields
  - Call onSubmit with task data

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Handles submission from TaskForm, invokes API to create a new task, reloads the task list. No user name passed because form does not provide it.
implementation.name: handleCreateTask
implementation.pseudo_code:
When TaskForm submits:
  - Call api.createTask with task data
  - Reload tasks from backend
  - Close the form

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Sends POST request to backend /tasks endpoint with task data (title, description, priority, due date, completed). Does not pass user name.
implementation.name: api.createTask
implementation.pseudo_code:
Send POST request to /tasks with task data
IF response is OK:
  - Return created task
ELSE:
  - Throw error

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: FastAPI endpoint for POST /tasks, receives task data and calls database.add_task. No user name field expected or validated.
implementation.name: create_task
implementation.pseudo_code:
On POST /tasks:
  - Receive TaskCreate data
  - Call database.add_task with data
  - Return created Task

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Creates a new Task object with provided fields, assigns unique ID, saves to storage. User name is not stored.
implementation.name: add_task
implementation.pseudo_code:
Get current tasks
Create new Task with unique ID and provided fields
Append to task list
Save updated list
Return new Task

missing_implementations: User name field is not collected in the UI form.
User name is not passed from the frontend to the backend.
Backend endpoint does not accept or validate user name.
Database logic does not store user name.
Validation for missing user name is not implemented as required by acceptance criteria.
